# AltairaLabs

> Open-core Kubernetes-native platform for deploying, governing, testing, and observing AI agents in production.

## What is AltairaLabs?

AltairaLabs builds Omnia, an open-core AgentOps platform for running AI agents on Kubernetes. The platform provides a complete production stack: runtime, deployment, governance, testing, observability, and cost attribution — all built on standard Kubernetes patterns (CRDs, Helm, GitOps).

## Products

- **Omnia** (OSS): The control plane. Kubernetes operator with 9 CRDs, all major LLM providers including hyperscaler-hosted (Bedrock, Vertex, Azure Foundry) plus Claude, GPT, Gemini, Ollama, 3-tier session storage, OpenTelemetry observability, OPA policy enforcement, cost attribution. Enterprise features: audit logging, encryption, session streaming (Kafka/Kinesis/NATS), analytics export (Snowflake/BigQuery/ClickHouse).
- **PromptKit** (OSS): Go-native agent runtime. Declarative agent configuration, gRPC streaming, native voice/multimodal, horizontal scale on Kubernetes.
- **PromptArena** (OSS): Testing and deployment. Distributed load testing, multi-turn evaluation, PromptPack creation and validation, deploy agents to Omnia/AWS AgentCore/other platforms. JUnit XML for CI/CD.
- **PromptPack** (OSS): Portable agent packaging format. Runtime-independent, OCI registry compatible, version/diff/rollback. Open spec at promptpack.org.

## Key Differentiators

- Self-hosted by default (not an enterprise upsell)
- Framework-agnostic (LangChain, CrewAI, ADK, custom code)
- Open-core model: full production platform is OSS (Apache 2.0), enterprise adds compliance/streaming/audit
- Kubernetes-native: standard CRDs, Helm charts, GitOps-ready, every component swappable
- Built for customer-facing agents: support, sales, onboarding

## Three Pillars

1. **Talk to Customers** (available now): Support, sales, onboarding agents
2. **Build Things** (coming soon): Software engineering, content, design agents
3. **Make Sense of Things** (coming soon): Analytics, reporting, knowledge management agents

## Maturity Model

- **Assist**: Human does the work, AI helps
- **Execute**: AI does the work, human reviews
- **Operate**: AI runs the operation, human oversees
